unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We celebrate our own birthdays.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: cel (策) + e + brate (波瑞特) -> 策划庆祝活动。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Birthday Celebrations
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: celebrate的动作名词形式，表示庆祝活动。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 惊奇；惊讶 v. 使感到意外
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How about a surprise party for them?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sur (在……之上) + prise (抓) -> 突然被抓住，感到十分惊讶。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 帖子；邮政 v. 邮寄；发布
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Read the posts from an online forum.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 在网络论坛上“寄出”的信息，就是帖子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Let's go and buy something for the party this weekend.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: some (一些) + thing (事情/东西) -> 某些事情或东西。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 联系；接触 v. 联系；联络
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: online forum interface with tabs 'HOME', 'ABOUT', 'POSTS', 'CONTACT'.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: con (共同) + tact (触摸) -> 共同触摸，就是联系、接触。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We have a sale today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s (死) + ale (麦芽酒) -> 死皮赖脸降价出售麦芽酒。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Six yuan a kilo.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: kilogram的简称，音译：千克、公斤。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Long noodles are a symbol of long life.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sym (共同) + bol (球) -> 共同围成一个球，象征着团结。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Every year, my family and I take a photo together under the big tree.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: take a photo vs draw a picture
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: take (拿取) + a + photo (照片) -> 拍一张照片。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: under the big tree in our village.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: vil (微) + lage (拉客) -> 微小的拉客之地是村庄。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Teng Fei, how about some yogurt?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: yo (哟) + gurt (果特) -> 优格，就是酸奶。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 总数；合计 adj. 总的；全体的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What's the total?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: to (头) + tal (特) -> 头等重要的事情是统计总数。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'd like to watch it grow with me.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: g + row (排) -> 绿苗排成排成长起来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: b (爸) + low (低) -> 爸爸低下头吹气球。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Read the conversation and complete the table.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: p (怕) + rice (大米) -> 害怕大米的价格上涨。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: blow (吹) + out (向外) -> 把火吹向外面，就是吹灭。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What else would you like to buy for a birthday party?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ball (球) + oon (气球形状) -> 充气像球一样的东西是气球。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Next, we enjoy the cake, and I open all my gifts.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: en (使) + joy (欢乐) -> 使自己欢乐，就是享受乐趣。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My mother always makes my favourite chocolate cake.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: choc (巧克) + o + late (力) -> 音译：巧克力。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What else would you like to buy for a birthday party?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: piz (比) + za (萨) -> 音译：比萨饼。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My father marks my height on the door every year.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: hei (黑) + ght -> 天黑了也挡不住身高的成长。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 名单；清单 v. 列表；列清单
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Put the things in the box into different groups on the shopping list.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: l (老) + ist (一堆人) -> 老师的清单上有一堆人的名字。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adv. & adj. 以后(的)；后来(的)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's fun to look at the marks later.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: late (迟到) + r -> 迟到的人在以后或者后来才来。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. & pron. 自己的；本人的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We celebrate our own birthdays.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: o + w + n -> 我自己完全拥有自己。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Next time, I also want to do something different.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: next (下一个) + time (次数/时间) -> 下一次。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Celebrating my birthday: When, What to prepare, Where to go, With whom, What to do, How I feel.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: who的宾格形式，用来询问动作的对象“谁”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For example, we celebrate William Shakespeare's birthday...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ex (出) + ample (充足的) -> 举出充足的例子来证明。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: For example, we celebrate William Shakespeare's birthday...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: for (为了) + example (例子) -> 作为例子，即“例如”。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: as English Language Day.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: lan (懒) + guage (规矩) -> 懒人说话也有规矩，就形成了语言。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And we celebrate International Nurses Day on 12th May.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: inter (在……之间) + national (国家的) -> 国家之间的，就是国际的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: v. 做记号；纪念；打分 n. 记号
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It marks the birthday of Florence Nightingale...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: m (马) + ark (方舟) -> 在马身上的方舟上做记号。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When is China's National Day?
unit_vocabulary.comparison: National Day vs New Year's Day
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: national (国家的) + Day (日子) -> 国家最重大的节日，即国庆节。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 中国共产党建党纪念日
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Talk about special days.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: CPC Founding Day vs National Day
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: CPC (中国共产党) + Founding (创建) + Day (日子)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: When is China's National Day?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: nation (国家) + al (形容词后缀) -> 国家的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 中国人民解放军建军节
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Talk about special days.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: PLA (中国人民解放军) + Day (日子) -> 八一建军节。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Talk about special days.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: f (爸) + o + u + n + d -> 爸爸辛辛苦苦创立了公司。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How do you make your birthday meaningful?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: mean (意思是) + ing + ful (充满的) -> 充满意义的，即有意义的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: and then I make a wish and blow out the candles.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: make a wish vs make a card
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: make (做一个) + a + wish (心愿) -> 许愿。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How old are you?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: how (如何) + old (年老的) -> 问年纪多大。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What birthday gift can Teng Fei give his father?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: birthday (生日) + gift (礼物) -> 生日礼物。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How about a surprise party for them?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: surprise (令人惊喜的) + party (聚会) -> 惊喜派对。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How much is this birthday cake?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: how (多少) + much (许多) -> 询问价格多少钱。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How many kilos do you want?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: how (多少) + many (许多) -> 询问可数物品的数量多少。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We have a sale today.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: have a sale vs on sale
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: have (有) + a + sale (售卖活动) -> 进行打折促销。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: How much is this birthday cake?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: birthday (生日) + cake (蛋糕) -> 生日蛋糕。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's so wonderful to watch you grow up.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: grow (生长) + up (向上) -> 长大成人。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 使某人抓狂，使某人非常生气
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sometimes you do drive me up the wall with your loud music.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: drive sb up the wall vs make sb happy
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: drive (逼迫) + sb + up the wall (上墙) -> 逼人上墙，使人抓狂。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Thank you so much for taking care of me and loving me every day.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: take care of vs look for
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: take care (小心/注意) + of (关于) -> 细心关照照料某人。
